items.text: Emerging artificial intelligence-related threats may increase the frequency and severity of these risks, and may also introduce new threats, both of which could be difficult to defend against.
items.rationale: This introduces a specific new threat vector—AI-related cybersecurity/threat risks—that was not previously disclosed, and explicitly states these could increase severity/frequency of risks and be difficult to defend against, representing a material expansion of the risk landscape rather than generic boilerplate.
